MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-17-2021 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER CRIS PLUNKETT'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
